name: Flexopack Societe Anonyme Commercial and Industrial Plastics Company
summary: Flexopack Soci√É¬©t√É¬© Anonyme Commercial and Industrial Plastics Company, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells flexible plastic packaging materials in Greece, other European countries, and internationally. It primarily offers barrier and non-barrier films. The company's products include shrink bags and films, skin films, thermoforming films, lidding films, and vacuum pouches; lamination films; and multi-layer co-extrusion films. It serves the food industry, which include meat, poultry, cheese, and fish, as well as printing/conversion and personal care packaging industries. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Koropi, Greece.
